concept: Develop a racing game where the track is being actively drawn just ahead of the racers by giant mythical creatures. Different creatures create different track elements - dragons create loop-de-loops, giants create bumpy terrain, krakens create underwater sections. Players must quickly adapt to unpredictable track conditions while collecting magical ink that can temporarily influence what the creatures draw next. The race concludes when the drawing creatures run out of canvas space, making every second and shortcut critically important.
